parameters.label: Gap persistence
parameters.description: Inertia in output gap dynamics. Controls how quickly the GDP gap closes; higher b1 means more inertia and slower recovery from shocks.
parameters.description_ru: Инерция в динамике разрыва выпуска. Контролирует скорость закрытия разрыва ВВП: высокий b1 = больше инерции, медленнее восстановление после шоков.
parameters.description_uz: Chiqarish bo'shlig'i dinamikasidagi inersiya. YaIM bo'shlig'i qanchalik tez yopilishini boshqaradi: yuqori b1 = ko'proq inersiya, sekinroq tiklanish.

parameters.label: MCI sensitivity
parameters.description: Monetary policy transmission to demand. How strongly monetary conditions (interest rate plus exchange rate) affect the output gap; key monetary transmission parameter.
parameters.description_ru: Трансмиссия денежной политики на спрос. Насколько денежные условия (ставка + курс) влияют на разрыв выпуска; ключевой параметр денежной трансмиссии.
parameters.description_uz: Pul-kredit siyosatining talabga transmissiyasi. Pul-kredit shartlari (foiz stavkasi + valyuta kursi) chiqarish bo'shlig'iga ta'sir kuchi; asosiy monetar transmissiya parametri.

parameters.label: External-demand channel
parameters.description: Foreign output gap spillover. Sensitivity of domestic output to foreign economic cycles; important for Uzbekistan as an open economy with significant trade and remittances.
parameters.description_ru: Перелив внешнего разрыва выпуска. Чувствительность внутреннего выпуска к внешним экономическим циклам; важно для открытой экономики Узбекистана с торговлей и денежными переводами.
parameters.description_uz: Tashqi chiqarish bo'shlig'i ta'siri. Ichki chiqarishning tashqi iqtisodiy tsikllarga sezgirligi; savdo va pul o'tkazmalari bo'lgan ochiq iqtisodiyot uchun muhim.

parameters.label: Real-rate MCI weight
parameters.description: Weight on the real-interest-rate gap in the monetary conditions index.

parameters.label: Inflation persistence
parameters.description: Backward-looking weight in the Phillips curve.

parameters.label: RMC inflation loading
parameters.description: Inflation response to real marginal cost.

parameters.label: Output-gap RMC weight
parameters.description: Output-gap weight inside real marginal cost.

parameters.label: Import-price pass-through
parameters.description: Direct quarterly import-price pass-through in the Phillips curve.

parameters.label: Policy-rate smoothing
parameters.description: Backward-looking smoothing in the Taylor rule.

parameters.label: Taylor inflation response
parameters.description: Taylor Principle: must exceed 1 for inflation stability. g2 = 1.5 means the CBU raises the nominal rate by 150 bp for every 1 pp inflation overshoot, ensuring the real rate rises to cool demand.
parameters.description_ru: Принцип Тейлора: должен превышать 1 для стабильности инфляции. g2 = 1.5: ЦБУ повышает ставку на 150 б.п. при каждом 1 п.п. превышения инфляции.
parameters.description_uz: Teylor printsipi: inflyatsiya barqarorligi uchun 1 dan katta bo'lishi shart. g2 = 1.5: har 1 p.p. inflyatsiya ortiqchaligida CBU stavkani 150 b.p. ko'taradi.

parameters.label: Taylor output-gap response
parameters.description: Output-gap response weight in the Taylor rule.

parameters.label: UIP backward weight
parameters.description: Exchange rate backward-looking share. Fraction of exchange rate expectations that are backward-looking; lower e1 means more forward-looking expectations and stronger UIP arbitrage discipline on the UZS.
parameters.description_ru: Доля обратных ожиданий курса. Доля ожиданий обменного курса, основанных на прошлых значениях; низкий e1 = более перспективные ожидания, более сильная дисциплина UIP для UZS.
parameters.description_uz: Valyuta kursining orqaga qaragan kutishlari ulushi. O'tgan kurslarga asoslangan kutishlar ulushi; past e1 = ko'proq istiqbolga yo'nalgan kutishlar, UZS uchun kuchliroq UIP intizomi.

parameters.label: Inflation target pi*
parameters.description: Long-run CBU inflation goal. Official target: 5% for 2024-2026. The Taylor Rule anchors the nominal rate to keep inflation near this value.
parameters.description_ru: Долгосрочная цель ЦБУ по инфляции. Официальная цель: 5% на 2024-2026 гг. Правило Тейлора удерживает номинальную ставку вблизи этого значения.
parameters.description_uz: CBU ning uzoq muddatli inflyatsiya maqsadi. Rasmiy maqsad: 2024-2026 yillar uchun 5%. Teylor qoidasi nominal stavkani ushbu qiymat atrofida saqlaydi.

parameters.label: Neutral nominal policy rate
parameters.description: Neutral nominal policy rate = neutral real rate r_bar (3.5%) + inflation target pi* (5.0%) = 8.5%. The rate consistent with steady-state output and the inflation target; constructed from the two legacy steady-state sliders.

parameters.label: Potential GDP growth
parameters.description: Steady-state potential real GDP growth used to translate gaps into growth paths.

parameters.label: External-demand persistence
parameters.description: AR(1) persistence for the foreign output-gap shock gap*_t.

scenarios.description: All shocks zero; economy follows the baseline path from Overview artifact baseline initial conditions toward steady state.
CBU cuts the policy rate by 100 bp below the Taylor-rule path; expect higher output gap and temporarily faster disinflation response.
CBU hikes the policy rate by 100 bp above the Taylor-rule path; expect lower output gap and stronger UZS via the UIP channel.
One-off 10% UZS depreciation against USD; expect inflation spike via direct pass-through (a4) and RER gap, plus policy-rate response.
Foreign output-gap downside shock using the active b3 external-demand channel. The foreign gap follows AR(1) decay with rho=0.75 and enters the IS curve as b3 * gap*_t.

caveats.message: External-demand shocks use the active b3 channel. The foreign output gap gap*_t follows AR(1) decay with rho=0.75 and enters the IS curve as b3 * gap*_t.

Legacy runBL() baseline forecast historically used an ad-hoc a2*rmc*3 scaling that is inconsistent with solveIRF(). The v2 legacy solver unified both paths through solveIRF(), and this R port matches the unified v2 solver; any residual divergence with older chart snapshots is expected.
The UIP block contains no persistent country-risk premium; sovereign-risk or capital-flight episodes are approximated only by a one-period rho shock (risk shock type).

Direct quarterly import-price pass-through a4=0.12 is calibrated from Campa & Goldberg (2005) with Uzbekistan's ~35% import share of absorption; a 10% UZS depreciation adds about +1.2 pp to CPI within one quarter through this channel alone.

Parameter-uncertainty fan charts are not included in this JSON export. The legacy UI provides Monte Carlo bands (8% CV, 80 draws) interactively; adding them to export requires TA decision (ROADMAP cross-model item).
Baseline initial conditions are taken from the latest valid Overview artifact when available; deterministic Q1 2026 fallback values are used only if that artifact is missing or invalid.
Historical fit/backtest data are not yet sufficient for Uzbekistan-specific forecast-accuracy claims. Validation is limited to schema checks, equation review, and directional shock sign checks.

The dynamic baseline is a model transition from current Overview conditions, not an official forecast. With high policy-rate and exchange-rate inputs, calibrated QPM disinflation can move below target during the transition; interpret this as a calibration caveat until historical fit/backtest work is complete.

baseline_source.note: QPM initial conditions use the latest approved Overview artifact where mapped. Warning-status trade metrics are retained as context but are not allowed to mechanically drive the baseline external-demand gap.

metrics.label: CBU policy rate
metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan policy rate

metrics.label: USD/UZS exchange rate
metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan exchange rate

metrics.label: Exports growth, YoY
metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated YoY
